{{Quote|We will triumph, I assure you. We will triumph because we serve a master more powerful than you can possibly imagine!|Vanko|<ref name="RM" />}}
'''Vanko''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Vanko was a native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="CA3" /> When [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Declaration of a New Order|declared]] his [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Vanko was made [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Bright Jewel Oversector/Legends|Bright Jewel Oversector]] and assumed the role of commander of the [[Eighth Army]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

An elderly career soldier and a friend of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], Vanko was one of two Moffs with territories bordering [[Maelstrom Nebula/Legends|the Maelstrom]]. Along with Moff [[Torpin]], Vanko submitted falsified budgets and financial reports to the Empire to try and disguise the fact that he was losing a great deal of money to a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group called the [[Riders of the Maelstrom]]. He and Torpin met in secret on board the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] to discuss what their next moves would be. Both believed that the pirate groups were working with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to plan a major offensive against their forces. The ''Kuari Princess'' was subsequently [[Attack on the Kuari Princess|attacked]] by the Riders.

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1st}}
